sentences.arabic: كَانَ الشُّعَرَاءُ قَدِيمًا يَكْتُبُونَ عَنِ الصَّحْرَاءِ وَالنُّجُومِ.
sentences.translation: Stari pjesnici su nekada pisali o pustinji i zvijezdama.
sentences.translationEn: Ancient poets used to write about the desert and the stars.

sentences.arabic: الشِّعْرُ الْعَرَبِيُّ جَمِيلٌ جِدًّا وَيَحْتَوِي عَلَى مَشَاعِرَ قَوِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapska poezija je veoma lijepa i sadrži snažna osjećanja.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic poetry is very beautiful and contains strong emotions.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ الْقَصَائِدَ فِي الْمَجَالِسِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi čitaju pjesme na kulturnim skupovima.
sentences.translationEn: People read poems in cultural gatherings.

sentences.arabic: أَنَا أُحِبُّ أَنْ أَتَعَلَّمَ بَحُورَ الشِّعْرِ وَأَوْزَانَهُ.
sentences.translation: Volim učiti o poetskim metrima i ritmovima.
sentences.translationEn: I like to learn the meters and rhythms of poetry.

sentences.arabic: الْكَلِمَاتُ فِي الشِّعْرِ تَبْدُو مِثْلَ الْمُوسِيقَى الْهَادِئَةِ.
sentences.translation: Riječi u poeziji zvuče poput tihe muzike.
sentences.translationEn: The words in poetry sound like calm music.
